retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and SOC PDF. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived for Meezan Plus account holders maintaining PKR 200,000 monthly average balance.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists Visa Silver issuance and annual fee at PKR 3,500 each.
Meezan Plus account holders maintaining PKR 200,000 monthly average balance receive an annual-fee waiver.
General eligibility appears to be tied to having a Meezan account.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived for Meezan Plus account holders maintaining PKR 200,000 monthly average balance.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists Visa Gold issuance and annual fee at PKR 4,500 each.
Meezan Plus account holders maintaining PKR 200,000 monthly average balance receive an annual-fee waiver.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Charges are waived for Premium customers maintaining average monthly balance of PKR 15,000,000 in checking accounts, PKR 20,000,000 across checking accounts and TDCs, or PKR 50,000,000 across checking accounts, TDCs, and Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificates from Meezan RDA.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists Visa Infinite issuance and annual fee at PKR 42,500 each.
There are two competing eligibility frames: premium-customer thresholds on the Premium Banking page and a lower PKR 1,000,000 issuance or average-balance threshold in the SOC PDF.
minimum_account_balance_pkr is anchored to the lower explicit bank-account threshold (PKR 1,000,000) while the higher premium-banking relationship criteria are preserved separately.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for Meezan Premium Banking customers with PKR 5M in accounts or PKR 7M in TDCs

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists Mastercard World issuance and annual fee at PKR 27,500 each.
World Debit Card is part of Meezan Premium Banking. PKR 5,000,000 in accounts or PKR 7,000,000 in Term Deposit Certificates required. No annual fee for qualifying customers.
There are two competing eligibility frames: premium-customer thresholds on the card page and a lower PKR 500,000 issuance or average-balance threshold in the SOC PDF.
minimum_account_balance_pkr is anchored to the lower explicit bank-account threshold (PKR 500,000) while the higher relationship-balance criterion is preserved separately.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Public pages mention first-year special pricing but do not clearly state a standing waiver rule.

notes: Businesswomen/self-employed threshold: PKR 75,000/month.
NRP threshold: PKR 150,000/month.
Account page says no minimum balance requirement and PKR 100 opening investment for the associated account.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First issuance and annual fee are free.

notes: Only for customers with Meezan Asaan Student Account.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived for Meezan Plus account holders maintaining PKR 200,000 monthly average balance.

notes: Recovered as an account-linked Mastercard classic tier.
Public sources confirm issuance against Meezan account relationships rather than salary underwriting.
No salary or balance threshold for standard PayPak.
PayPak page and current SOC disagree on some fee values, so the fee should be treated as an unresolved official-source conflict.
Applies to both boys and girls design variants.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Published as free for Premium customers maintaining the required Premium Banking criteria.

notes: Premium relationship recovered from public premium-banking eligibility rather than a salary rule.

Current public Premium Banking page publishes the Platinum Mastercard Debit Card as free for Premium customers; no separate standard annual-fee line for this card was surfaced in the Jan-Jun 2026 public SOC.
Public page frames it as linked to the customer's Meezan Bank account.
